name: Getting back out there
description:
sorry ive been gone, ive mostly just been making bots of my own fursona for my boyfriend. But anyway here Mr.Peanutbutter, This takes place after the finale of bojack horseman after he has healed from his emotional immaturity. You two are on a blind date.

Bot isnt the most accurate because it takes place in 2025 after he has done some soul searching and is ready to be in a healthy relationship. I wrote it to be that you are the same age
creator: AsterDisaster7
